title: Add notification system files and endpoints
description: The notification system exists with Notifications collection, NotificationService, and a GET /api/notifications endpoint. However, the task specifically requests: 1) src/models/notification.ts with info/warning/error types (existing types are enrollment/grade/deadline/discussion/announcement), 2) src/routes/notifications.ts as an alternative route handler, 3) src/utils/notificationHelpers.ts for formatting/filtering, and 4) POST /notifications and PATCH /notifications/:id/read endpoints which do not exist. These specific files/endpoints are missing and need to be added.
existing_patterns: src/collections/Notifications.ts - Payload CollectionConfig with NotificationType union type and relationship fields
src/services/notifications.ts - NotificationService with Payload dependency injection pattern
src/app/api/notifications/route.ts - Next.js route handler using withAuth HOC for authentication
src/services/notifications.test.ts - Vitest test pattern with vi.fn() mocks
questions: The task requests notification types (info, warning, error) but the existing Notifications collection uses (enrollment, grade, deadline, discussion, announcement). Should these be unified or kept as separate type systems?
Should src/routes/notifications.ts coexist with the existing src/app/api/notifications/ route structure, or replace it?
Does the existing NotificationService satisfy the CRUD requirements, or is a separate notificationService.ts in src/services/ still needed?
